programmes.show_description: The path to love is never straight... Dannii Minogue is back to play Cupid in this smash-hit gay dating show - and this time, we're helping girls who like girls! (HD)
Jonathan Ross, the heavyweight of comedy chat, gets up close and personal with A-list stars in this no-holds-barred talk show. (HD)
This channel is currently off air.
Jason Manford hosts the general knowledge quiz show in which the four contestants can always give an answer - but can they give an unbeatable answer? (HD)
Three players are pit against a mesmerising machine. There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player. (HD)
Huge global hit game show The Chase is the ultimate heart-racing, high-pressure quiz. (HD)

Contestants compete to be part of the winning combination - a perfect storm of players, general knowledge and cash up for grabs. (HD)

Three fashionistas compete with each other in a shopping spree to win the ultimate prize of going on a blind date with a fashion savvy singleton. (HD)
A look into the ever-growing phenomenon of storage hoarding, and shines a light on couples whose relationships are taking the strain because they have too many possessions (HD)

Two families are trading houses and budgets for a week. Will this social experiment make them reassess their own day-to-day lives and the value they have on money? (HD)
Hosted by Lee Mack, forget IQ, this is the gameshow that tests logic, brainpower and common sense. (HD)
More aspiring restaurateurs cook up a storm under the watchful eye of terrifying superstar chef Gordon Ramsay. (HD)
Lisa Vanderpump lifts the velvet curtain on the drama-filled lives of her mischievous staff while opening Vanderpump à Paris in Las Vegas. (HD)
